page_metadata.biotools__summary: KnowSeq is an R package for the automatic smart gene expression tool for retrieving relevant biological knowledge. KnowSeq proposes a novel methodology that comprises the most relevant steps in the Transcriptomic gene expression analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: KnowSeq is an R package for the automatic smart gene expression tool for retrieving relevant biological knowledge. KnowSeq proposes a novel methodology that comprises the most relevant steps in the Transcriptomic gene expression analysis.
